2604.24622.title: CF-VLA: Efficient Coarse-to-Fine Action Generation for Vision-Language-Action Policies
2604.24622.paper_summary: Flow-based vision-language-action (VLA) policies offer strong expressivity for action generation, but suffer from a fundamental inefficiency: multi-step inference is required to recover action structure from uninformative Gaussian noise, leading to a poor efficiency-quality trade-off under real-time constraints. We address this issue by rethinking the role of the starting point in generative action modeling. Instead of shortening the sampling trajectory, we propose CF-VLA, a coarse-to-fine two-stage formulation that restructures action generation into a coarse initialization step that constructs an action-aware starting point, followed by a single-step local refinement that corrects residual errors. Concretely, the coarse stage learns a conditional posterior over endpoint velocity to transform Gaussian noise into a structured initialization, while the fine stage performs a fixed-time refinement from this initialization. To stabilize training, we introduce a stepwise strategy that first learns a controlled coarse predictor and then performs joint optimization. Experiments on CALVIN and LIBERO show that our method establishes a strong efficiency-performance frontier under low-NFE (Number of Function Evaluations) regimes: it consistently outperforms existing NFE=2 methods, matches or surpasses the NFE=10 $π_{0.5}$ baseline on several metrics, reduces action sampling latency by 75.4\%, and achieves the best average real-robot success rate of 83.0\%, outperforming MIP by 19.5 points and $π_{0.5}$ by 4.0 points. These results suggest that structured, coarse-to-fine generation enables both strong performance and efficient inference. Our code is available at https://github.com/EmbodiedAI-RoboTron/CF-VLA.
2604.24622.paper_summary_zh: 基於流的視覺-語言-行動（VLA）策略提供了強大的行動生成表達能力，但存在一個根本的低效問題：需要多步推斷來從無信息的高斯噪聲中恢復行動結構，這在實時約束下導致了效率與質量之間的權衡不佳。我們通過重新思考生成行動建模中起始點的角色來解決這個問題。我們提出CF-VLA，一種粗到細的兩階段公式，將行動生成重構為一個粗略初始化步驟，該步驟構建了一個行動感知的起始點，然後進行一次性局部精煉以修正殘餘誤差。具體而言，粗略階段學習了一個條件後驗，該後驗針對終點速度，將高斯噪聲轉換為結構化的初始化，而細緻階段則從這一初始化進行固定時間的精煉。為了穩定訓練，我們引入了一種逐步策略，首先學習一個受控的粗略預測器，然後進行聯合優化。在CALVIN和LIBERO上的實驗表明，我們的方法在低-NFE（函數評估次數）範疇下建立了強大的效率-性能邊界：它始終優於現有的NFE=2方法，在幾個指標上與NFE=10 $π_{0.5}$基準相匹配或超越，將行動取樣延遲減少了75.4\%，並達到了83.0\%的最佳平均實際機器人成功率，超越了MIP 19.5分和$π_{0.5}$ 4.0分。這些結果表明，結構化的粗到細生成能夠實現強大的性能和高效的推斷。我們的代碼可在https://github.com/EmbodiedAI-RoboTron/CF-VLA獲得。
2604.24622.author: Fan Du et.al.
2604.24622.authors: Fan Du, Feng Yan, Jianxiong Wu, Xinrun Xu, Weiye Zhang, Weinong Wang, Yu Guo, Bin Qian, Zhihai He
